case_title: JANELLE WENGER VS. POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64636285) FILED BY DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR REASONABLE SANCTIONS AND ATTORNEYS FEES: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC. TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF JANELLE WENGER TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) SERVED JANUARY 17, 2020 IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: WITHIN 14 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO THE FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND PAY DISCOVERY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $660 (2 HOURS X $150/HOUR PLUS $60 FILING FEE). PREVAILING PARTY TO SEND PROPOSED ORDER TRACKING THE TENTATIVE RULING VIA EMAIL TO RMEAD@FOLGERLEVIN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROGER MEAD, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR APR-19-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-07-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED DISCOVERY ORDER (TRANSACTION ND # 66047283) FILED BY DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 66225943)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-8-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THIS MATTER WAS PREVIOUSLY BEFORE THE COURT ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS. AT THAT TIME THE COURT CONTINUED THE MOTION TO GIVE PLAINTIFF UNTIL FEBRUARY 8, 2021 TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER OF AUGUST 26, 2020. THERE IS NO INDICATION IN THE RECORD THAT PLAINTIFF HAS COMPLIED WITH THESE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S ACTION SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Defendant Polk Street Restaurant Group'S Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

THIS MATTER WAS PREVIOUSLY BEFORE THE COURT ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS. AT THAT TIME THE COURT CONTINUED THE MOTION TO GIVE PLAINTIFF UNTIL FEBRUARY 8, 2021 TO COMPLY WITH THIS COURT'S ORDER OF AUGUST 26, 2020. THERE IS NO INDICATION IN THE RECORD THAT PLAINTIFF HAS COMPLIED WITH THESE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. ACCORDINGLY, PLAINTIFF'S ACTION SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER OF DISMISSAL, SUBMIT TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF AND DELIVER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM BY EMAIL AT rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories, And Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Charlene Rosack for Defendant/Moving Party.
No other appearances.

THE MOVING PARTY STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE MOVING PARTY AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Not argued; Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT POLK STREET RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrogatories, And Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys Fees:

The unopposed motion of Defendant Polk Street Restaurant Group, Inc. to compel Plaintiff Janelle Wenger to provide responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories (Set One) and Special Interrogatories (Set One) served January 17, 2020 is granted as follows: Within 14 days of entry of this order, Plaintiff shall serve code compliant responses, without objections, to the Form and Special Interrogatories, and pay discovery sanctions in the amount of $660 (2 hours x $150/hour plus $60 filing fee).

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to rmead@folgerlevin.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
